title: Projects & Innovations
subtitle: Where computer science meets occupational safety — building tools that make workplaces safer and smarter.

projects.title: Safety Management System
projects.tagline: Full-stack web app for HSE compliance tracking
projects.description: A comprehensive safety management platform built as a Final Year Project. Features dual-role access for Admins and Safety Officers to manage incidents, inspections, permits, and compliance reports in real-time.

projects.title: Safety Learning App
projects.tagline: Mobile-first e-learning platform for HSE training
projects.description: An interactive learning application designed to deliver safety training modules, quizzes, and awareness content. Built to help workers and officers stay current with HSE regulations and best practices.
features: Safety training modules with video content

projects.title: Safety Automation Toolkit
projects.tagline: Excel & automation tools for HSE professionals
projects.description: A suite of automated Excel-based tools designed to eliminate manual paperwork for safety officers. Includes dynamic risk assessment calculators, incident log templates, inspection schedulers, and KPI dashboards — all formula-driven with zero manual data entry.
